meta.description:
Welcome to Emoji Simulator.

Here are some example setups to spark your imagination: (copy-paste links below)

🔥 Forest Fires (this one you're seeing!)
(← CLICK on the grid to create a fire)

💀 Epidemics
./?s=sick

🌸 Conway's Game of Life
./?s=conway

🔴 B-Z Chemical Spirals
./?s=bz

🐹 Schelling's Segregation Model
./?s=schelling

🦊 Predator-Prey Model
./?s=prey

🏖 Procedurally Generated Beaches
./?s=beach

😐 [Blank Sim] (to make your own)
./?s=blank

You can edit the text in any of these textboxes, including this one. Change the rules and emoji below to make new sims. Finally, you can save and share your sim.

Have fun!

states.name: tree
states.description: Catches on fire if hit by lightning, or if a neighbor's on fire.
